title: Usteria barclayana
intro: I couldn't find any information about a plant called "Usteria barclayana".
taxonomy: Usteria barclayana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. This family includes other plants commonly known as heaths or heathers. Further classification of Usteria barclayana places it in the genus Usteria. The genus Usteria is relatively small, consisting of only a few species. The exact classification of Usteria barclayana within the Ericaceae family may be subject to change as new research and discoveries are made.
